html:
“Frequently, hits on this crown will cause it to create an impenetrable barrier for a short time.”

-

The Thulecite Crown is a craftable Item found in the Ancient Pseudoscience Filter. It requires 4 Nightmare Fuel, 4 Thulecite and an Ancient Pseudoscience Station to craft. It also has a 33% chance to be found inside a Large Ornate Chest. Like all items from the Ancient Tab, Thulecite Crowns cannot be prototyped and can only be crafted when near an Ancient Pseudoscience Station.

The Thulecite Crown is head Armor that will absorb 90% of physical damage and has 1200 durability. When the wearer takes damage from an attack, it has a 33% chance to create a force field. The force field lasts for 4 seconds, preventing all damage from attacks (except for Fire) and granting stun immunity. While the force field is active, 5% of incoming damage is reduced from Sanity. The force field cannot occur more than once every 9 seconds. Unequipping the Crown will disable an active force field, even though the animation remains. The Crown's force field emits enough light to protect the player from Charlie.

Thulecite is renewable by killing the Ancient Fuelweaver to reset the Ruins and by feeding Amberosia to Dust Moths. Therefore, an unlimited amount of Thulecite Crowns can be crafted.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Assets
  • 5 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Arcane Headpiece skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
  • The Loyal Nouveau Crown skin was awarded for watching 3 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 15, 2022 to June 29, 2022.
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Arcane Headpiece
The ancient secrets it holds have been lost to time.
See ingame
Loyal
Art Nouveau Collection
Nouveau Crown Suit
Royal tradition meets artistic expression.

Tips

  • As it is clear from its perk, the Thulecite Crown is more suited for tanking enemies instead of kiting them.
  • The Crown is really useful when facing big groups of Mobs like Spiders, Hounds, and Birchnutters, as the force field will protect the players from being stunlocked.
  • The force field will protect from the special effects of enemy attacks, such as those of Frogs.
  • The Crown is a great armor for Willow, Maxwell, and Wigfrid since these characters can regain their sanity easily.
  • It is generally advised to also wear disposable body armor to increase the life of the Thulecite Crown. The Log Suit can absorb roughly 47% of already absorbed damage, effectively increasing the life of the Thulecite Crown from 840 to 1585.

Trivia

  • The Thulecite Crown was added in A Moderately Friendly Update.
  • Although the crown showcases a Red Gem, one does not need it to craft the crown.

–Walter
“I'm never taking it off!”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vương miện Thulecite là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ Lọc Giả Khoa Cổ Đại. Nó cần 4 Nhiên Liệu Ác Mộng, 4 Thulecite và Trạm Giả Khoa Học Cổ Đại để chế tạo. Nó cũng có 33% cơ hội được tìm thấy bên trong Rương trang trí công phu lớn. Giống như tất cả các vật phẩm từ Thẻ Cổ, Vương Miện Thulecite không thể tạo nguyên mẫu và chỉ có thể chế tạo khi ở gần Trạm Giả Khoa Cổ Đại.
